Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.

    DefaultFailoverStoreQueryResolver(String tablePrefix, Serializer serializer, DatabaseResolver databaseResolver, PayloadColumnResolver payloadColumnResolver)
    Constructs the resolver: substitutes tablePrefix into all SQL templates and selects the appropriate merge dialect from the database product name.

  • Uses of Serializer in com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.serializer.cipher

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc.serializer.cipher that implement Serializer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EncryptingSerializer
    Serializer decorator that encrypts the serialized payload string before it is stored and decrypts it on read (audit: payload-at-rest encryption for the JDBC store).
